texto: I have no definable history before I was abandoned and taken in by the orphanage in Hong Kong. I truly am a blank sheet. I have been disconnected from my ancestors. I don't know who they are, where they came from or whether any of their line still exists. The ancestral umbilical cord that would have connected me to my past and linked me to my future, was permanently severed. It cannot be reattached
explicacao: Citação de Lucy Chau Lai-Tuen sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I have no definable history before I was abandoned and taken in by the orphanage in Hong Kong. I …” articula reflexao, adooption, belonging em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como luto e belonging.
